title: Microstylis macrostachya
taxonomy: Microstylis macrostachya is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Microstylis macrostachya is a part of the genus Microstylis. The species is native to tropical Asia, specifically in countries such as India, China, and Southeast Asia. It is a type of terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on the ground rather than on other plants.
